title: STONEBORN - Denis' Mod Compats
description: Small collection of Stoneborn UI Overhaul mod compats.
body:
This is a small collection of Stoneborn UI Overhaul mod compats.
It will be updated every once in a while, while also considering user requests. You are free to post some requests in the [issues tab](https://github.com/mxKeaton/Denis-Stoneborn-Additions/issues)!

### Adds full compatibility to:

- [Beautify](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated)
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
- [Completionist Index](https://modrinth.com/mod/completionists-index)
- [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Even Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/even-better-archeology)
- [Frostiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/frostiful)
- [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis)
- [Item Swapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [More Banner Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-banner-features)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [Universal Sawmill](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-sawmill)
- [Recursive Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/recursiveresources)
- [Scorchful](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorchful)
- [Storage Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/storage-delight)
- [Superb Steeds](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-steeds)
- [TieredZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/tieredz)
- [Trading Post](https://modrinth.com/mod/trading-post)
- [Transmog](https://modrinth.com/mod/transmog)
- [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs)
- [Universal Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-graves)
- [Villager Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagersplus)

### Adds text fixes & minor additions to:
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)

### Adds text fixes to:
- [Farmers Delight (Refabricated)](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)

### Suggested sorting order is:
- STONEBORN - Denis' Additions
- _other STONEBORN Addons_
- STONEBORN UI Overhaul

Credit goes to the original [STONEBORN UI Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stoneborn) resource pack and its creators.
